pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain AI/ML Engineering KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.415) to justify inclusion for the Director of AI Ethics/Responsible AI. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world Director of AI Ethics/Responsible AI roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for Director of AI Ethics/Responsible AI roles increasingly include AI/ML Engineering competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for Director of AI Ethics/Responsible AI now include AI/ML Engineering competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. AI/ML Engineering task KSA is relevant to the Director of AI Ethics/Responsible AI based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
